div1.entryFree: Fedary, accomplice: let my brother die, if not a f., but only he owe and succeed thy weakness, Meas. II, 4, 122 (F2. Meas. II, 4, 122 4 and M. Edd. feodary, as if it came from feod, and not from foedus). art thou a f. for this act, and lookest so virgin-like without? Cymb. III, 2, 21 (O. Edd. foedary).
